items.title: Cigna Boilermaker
items.content:
Cigna group number 3334628. It is extremely important that these are escalated immediately for payor update. 
Reference: Link

items.title: ONN Remark Codes
items.content:
N864 - This claim is subject to the No Surprises Act provisions that apply to emergency services. 
Reference: Link

items.title: Postal FEP Pacific
items.content:
For FEP Pacific customers: update to Blue Shield FEP if the claim has an initial 25 claim number, an R policy, and California state.

Reference: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773336320971?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D

items.title: TRS / HEALTHSELECT
items.content:
TRS / HealthSelect showing as OOS may still be processed.

TRS and HealthSelect are fully insured only in the state of Texas.

If a claim has a TRS or HealthSelect policy number and the state is Oklahoma, it is considered OOS for NSA.

Reference: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773843906989?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D

items.title: Ambetter and BAYLOR & SCOTT claims
items.content:
EOB remark codes surpass the funding type.

It is very important to go by how the EOB was processed.

Exception: Ambetter and Baylor & Scott.

Reference: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1774280496477?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D

items.title: FEP or FEDERAL FEP
items.content:
Always make queries with the POC even if instructions exist from the payor mapping team on how to identify an FEP claim.

Reference: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/message/19:040d113871eb4d6bab8685db63548e85@thread.v2/1773153793247?context=%7B%22contextType%22%3A%22chat%22%7D
